summary: PR 2434 focused on Venom stage decomp work in src/melee/gr/grvenom.c, with supporting ground variable typing in src/melee/gr/types.h and a prototype correction in src/melee/gr/grvenom.h. Evidence shows grVenom_80204428 became a 100% match, grVenom_80206874 improved from 0.00% to 82.52%, and grVenom_802053B0 regressed in the bot report.

key_files.role: Main Venom stage decomp edits: typed ground-var accesses, PAD_STACK in grVenom_80204428, cleanup of fake-match comments and expanded assert code, grVenom_80206874 enabled and improved.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grvenom.c added 105 deleted 114 hunks 12
raw_diff: grVenom_80204428 replaces mutecity2 bitfield borrowing with gp->gv.venom2 fields and adds PAD_STACK(8)
raw_diff: grVenom_80204B88 removes local GroundVenom_ForLighting and uses Ground* plus gp->gv.venom2.xE0_state
raw_diff: grVenom_802053B0 replaces manual jobj.h assert expansion with HSD_JObjSetRotationY
raw_diff: grVenom_80206874 removed from #if 0 and implemented to 82.52% per bot report

key_files.role: Ground variable type updates: grVenom_GroundVars expanded through gp+0x100 and grVenom_GroundVars2 added for JObj pointers and xE0 bitfield/state access.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/types.h added 59 deleted 26 hunks 3
raw_diff: grVenom_GroundVars gains xF0, xF4, xF8, xFC, x100
raw_diff: grVenom_GroundVars2 added with HSD_JObj* xC4-xDC and xE0_state union
raw_diff: Ground union gains venom2 arm

key_files.role: Header prototype update for grVenom_80205E84 from Vec2* to Vec3*.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: src/melee/gr/grvenom.h added 1 deleted 1 hunks 1
raw_diff: grVenom_80205E84 prototype changed from s32 grVenom_80205E84(Vec2*) to s32 grVenom_80205E84(Vec3*)

what_changed: grVenom_80204428 replaced casts through grVenom_GroundVars and borrowed gp->gv.mutecity2.xC4_flags with the new gp->gv.venom2 JObj pointer fields and xE0_state bitfields; PAD_STACK(8) was added.
grVenom_80204B88 removed a local temporary GroundVenom_ForLighting struct and reads/writes the xE0 state through gp->gv.venom2.xE0_state.
grVenom_802052E0 changed local declaration order and initializes all components with chained assignment to grVe_804DB740 in the fallback path.

grVenom_802053B0 reduced raw casts on venom.xD4/xD8 state accesses and changed calls to grVenom_80205E84 to pass Vec3* directly; it also replaced a manual jobj.h assert expansion with HSD_JObjSetRotationY.
grVenom_80205AD4 replaced raw gp+0xF0 through gp+0x100 pointer arithmetic with named grVenom_GroundVars fields xF0, xF4, xF8, xFC, and x100.
grVenom_80205E84 signature changed from Vec2* to Vec3* in both source and header.

grVenom_80206874 was moved out of #if 0 and partially implemented, including data table reads, child/other ground object setup, scale setting through HSD_JObjSetScaleX/Y/Z, and Venom ground state initialization.
The bot report records one new match, grVenom_80204428 at 100.00%, and improvements for grVenom_80206874, .sdata2, and grVenom_80204284, but a regression for grVenom_802053B0.

smart_moves.text: Converted a fake cross-union bitfield workaround into a Venom-specific union arm, improving source readability and aligning with typed-field recovery.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed comment about accessing bitfields using mutecity2
raw_diff: added struct grVenom_GroundVars2 and Ground union venom2 arm
raw_diff: grVenom_80204428 uses gp->gv.venom2.xE0_state.b0-b6

smart_moves.text: Updated the owning header when grVenom_80205E84 source signature changed from Vec2* to Vec3*.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grVenom_80205E84 definition changed to Vec3*
raw_diff: grvenom.h prototype changed to Vec3*

smart_moves.text: Mapped a raw expanded jobj.h assert block back to an HSD_JObjSetRotationY helper, consistent with header-inline cleanup when line-number evidence points at an existing helper.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed manual __assert("jobj.h", 0x294/0x295) and direct rotate assignment
raw_diff: added HSD_JObjSetRotationY(jobj, grVe_804DB740)

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a stage ground var is accessed both as object pointers and as bitfields/state, adding a stage-specific GroundVars union arm can remove fake casts, borrowed unrelated union arms, and temporary overlay structs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grVenom_GroundVars2 added with HSD_JObj* fields and xE0_state union
raw_diff: grVenom_80204428 no longer borrows mutecity2.xC4_flags
raw_diff: grVenom_80204B88 removes GroundVenom_ForLighting local overlay

decomp_lessons.lesson: If a helper only reads x/y but callers already pass Vec3 positions, changing the prototype to Vec3* can remove callsite casts and should be reflected in the header.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grVenom_80205E84 changed from Vec2* to Vec3*
raw_diff: casts (Vec2*) &sp28 and (Vec2*) &sp1C removed
raw_diff: grvenom.h prototype updated

decomp_lessons.lesson: Replacing raw gp+offset writes with recovered fields improves reviewability, but field type recovery may remain incomplete when code still casts f32 fields as s32 in nearby logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grVenom_80205AD4 replaces gp+0xF0..0x100 with xF0..x100
raw_diff: grVenom_80206874 still uses *(s32*) &gp->gv.venom.xEC/xE8/xE4/xE0

naming_conventions.name: grVenom_GroundVars2
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct grVenom_GroundVars2 added
raw_diff: Ground union adds venom2
naming_conventions.notes: Name is address/stage-derived and distinguishes a second Venom layout used for JObj pointers and xE0 state.

naming_conventions.name: xE0_state and xE0_state_pad
evidence_refs: raw_diff: xE0_state union added with bitfields b0-b7 and state subfield
raw_diff: grVenom_80204B88 uses gp->gv.venom2.xE0_state.xE0_state_pad.state
naming_conventions.notes: Names preserve offset-based uncertainty while giving local role for the bitfield/state access.

naming_conventions.name: other, other_gp, data, type, scale, scl
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grVenom_80206874 renames child_gobj/child_gp/entry/case_val/scale_factor to other/other_gp/data/type/scale
naming_conventions.notes: Local names become shorter role names, but several remain generic because semantics are not fully proven.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK(8) was added in grVenom_80204428 to close the register/stack-sensitive match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(8) added to grVenom_80204428
text_corpus bot report: grVenom_80204428 99.70% to 100.00%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: PAD_STACK is a matching tactic that should remain narrowly justified by objdiff/checkdiff evidence; the PR evidence contains the bot match report but not a local objdiff transcript.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration order and padding locals were adjusted in grVenom_80204284 and grVenom_802052E0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: u32 pad2 and u32 pad added in grVenom_80204284
raw_diff: Vec3 jobj_pos moved earlier in grVenom_802052E0
text_corpus bot report: grVenom_80204284 97.58% to 97.74%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: Evidence shows score improvement but not the exact reason or whether neighboring functions were checked.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Header inline/helper reconstruction replaced an expanded assert block with HSD_JObjSetRotationY.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed fake-match comment about HSD_JObjSetRotationY assert line numbers
raw_diff: added HSD_JObjSetRotationY(jobj, grVe_804DB740)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: The diff suggests line-number/assert evidence, but no separate objdiff proof is included in the loaded PR slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Partially decompiled grVenom_80206874 was enabled from an #if 0 block and improved substantially without reaching full match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: #if 0/#endif around grVenom_80206874 removed
text_corpus bot report: grVenom_80206874 0.00% to 82.52%
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk: The function retained a todo stating 32.92% in source context while the bot reports 82.52%; the slice does not explain the discrepancy.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Matched code improved by +0.01% and +284 bytes. grVenom_80204428 became a new 100.00% match. grVenom_80206874 improved from 0.00% to 82.52%, .sdata2 improved from 10.17% to 19.53%, and grVenom_80204284 improved from 97.58% to 97.74%. grVenom_802053B0 regressed from 95.38% to 82.77%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl issue_comment by decomp-dev[bot]

notes: Strong evidence exists for changed files, exact source edits, and bot-reported match/regression deltas.
The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments, so author intent and reviewer rationale cannot be inferred.
No local objdiff/checkdiff transcript is loaded beyond the decomp-dev bot summary.
The diff retains a source todo saying grVenom_80206874 is 32.92%, while the bot report says 82.52%; this record preserves both as evidence rather than resolving the discrepancy.
Several field names remain offset-style, so semantic meaning of Venom ground vars is not proven by this slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use stage-specific GroundVars arms instead of borrowed union arms for offset-compatible bitfields
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2434, grVenom_80204428 stopped using gp->gv.mutecity2.xC4_flags to access Venom xE0 bitfields and introduced grVenom_GroundVars2 in the Ground union. This is a grounded example of replacing unrelated union-arm borrowing with a stage-specific typed layout.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removed mutecity2 bitfield workaround comment
raw_diff: added grVenom_GroundVars2 and venom2 union arm
raw_diff: grVenom_80204428 uses gp->gv.venom2.xE0_state

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prototype cleanup should update both callsites and owning header
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2434, grVenom_80205E84 changed from Vec2* to Vec3*, callsite casts were removed, and grvenom.h was updated in the same PR.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: definition and header prototype changed to Vec3*
raw_diff: grVenom_802053B0 callsite casts removed

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/gr/grvenom.c uses two Venom GroundVars layouts
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2434 added grVenom_GroundVars2 and a Ground union venom2 arm for Venom JObj pointer slots xC4-xDC and xE0 bitfield/state access, while retaining grVenom_GroundVars for other Venom offset fields through x100.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: struct grVenom_GroundVars expanded through x100
raw_diff: struct grVenom_GroundVars2 added
raw_diff: Ground union adds venom2
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path fact for future grvenom work; should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: grVenom_80205E84 takes Vec3* after PR 2434
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2434 changed grVenom_80205E84 from Vec2* to Vec3* in src/melee/gr/grvenom.c and src/melee/gr/grvenom.h and removed Vec2* casts at callsites in grVenom_802053B0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grVenom_80205E84 definition changed to Vec3*
raw_diff: grvenom.h prototype changed to Vec3*
raw_diff: grVenom_802053B0 calls grVenom_80205E84(&sp28) and grVenom_80205E84(&sp1C)
source_update_candidates.reason: Concrete signature/path fact from the PR slice, but current source should be checked before adding to any maintained path-facts source.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK examples should record bot/objdiff evidence and regression context
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2434 used PAD_STACK(8) in grVenom_80204428 and the bot report shows the function reached 100.00%, but the same report also shows a regression in grVenom_802053B0. This is a candidate example for the existing standard that matching tactics need narrow evidence and regression awareness.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(8) added
text_corpus bot report: grVenom_80204428 99.70% to 100.00%
text_corpus bot report: grVenom_802053B0 95.38% to 82.77%
source_update_candidates.reason: Could strengthen examples for an existing standard, but the loaded slice lacks full objdiff/regression investigation.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that the HSD_JObjSetRotationY replacement is universally correct for rotate.z-like code; this slice only shows the grVenom_802053B0 edit and its comment history.
Do not promote grVenom_80206874 as matched; the bot report says 82.52%, not 100%, and the source still contains a todo.
Do not treat the .sdata2 improvement as a data-matching lesson; the slice gives no data ownership rationale beyond the bot score line.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments or reviews are loaded.
